rationale: The citing paper’s core method includes a supervised hierarchical Dirichlet process over user-generated textual tags, while the cited paper is a marketing-methods paper centered on LDA-based extraction of latent dimensions from online chatter. Given this direct methodological overlap (topic-modeling of UGC in marketing) and only a DOI-level match without in-text context, this is not safely classifiable as an incidental mention and should be kept for full relation judgment.
